_comment: POST /api/v1/applications — OpenBao secrets manager (single-node Raft, UI enabled, platform-services)
_curl: curl -s -X POST -H 'Host: gitopsgui.podzone.cloud' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Forwarded-User: martin' -H 'X-Auth-Request-Groups: cluster-operators' -d @applications/openbao.json http://freyr:8081/api/v1/applications

_schema_review.name: str — application name; becomes namespace + HelmRelease name
_schema_review.cluster: str — target cluster for this catalog registration
_schema_review.chart_name: str — chart name within the repo
_schema_review.chart_version: str — pinned chart version; confirm latest at https://openbao.github.io/openbao-helm/
_schema_review.values_yaml: str — base values; single-node Raft (ha.enabled=false), UI, piraeus-datastore PVC

name: openbao
values_yaml:
server:
  dataStorage:
    enabled: true
    size: 20Gi
    storageClass: piraeus-datastore
  ha:
    enabled: false
    replicas: 1
  ui:
    enabled: true
    serviceType: ClusterIP
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 250m
      memory: 512Mi
    limits:
      cpu: 1000m
      memory: 1Gi
podDisruptionBudget:
  enabled: true
  maxUnavailable: 0
